# Thunderstudy — CUET Preparation Platform
# By Wondermayank (@wondermayank)
# https://commercesehoga.github.io

> Thunderstudy is a free CUET exam preparation platform for Class 12 students of ALL streams.
> Covers Commerce, Science, Humanities, English, GAT, Computer Science, IP and Physical Education.
> Features: Chapter-wise CBT mock tests, CUET scoring (+5/-1), analytics, class rank leaderboard,
> HP/XP/RP gamification, Firebase sync, PDF score cards, badge system.
> Based on NCERT Class 12 syllabus. Completely free. By Wondermayank.

## Subjects Covered
Commerce: Business Studies, Economics, Accountancy
Science: Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Mathematics
Humanities: History, Political Science, Geography, Sociology
Language: English Language and Literature
Aptitude: General Aptitude Test (GAT)
Technology: Computer Science, Informatics Practices (IP)
Health: Physical Education

## Platform
- Main CUET Dashboard: https://commercesehoga.github.io/cuet/
- GitHub Pages: https://commercesehoga.github.io/
